title: Famous UFO Researcher Reportedly Dies Just A Few Years After Saying He Wasn’t Suicidal
description: David Wilcock, an American paranormal writer and media personality, has passed away at age 53, TMZ reported on Wednesday.

title: Famous UFO Researcher Reportedly Dies Just A Few Years After Saying He Wasn’t Suicidal
description: David Wilcock, an American paranormal writer and media personality, has passed away at age 53, TMZ reported on Wednesday. Officials in Boulder County, Colorado, reported that deputies were sent out on Monday after a 911 call was received at about 10:44am local time regarding an unspecified issue just outside the town of Nederland, according to [...] The post Famous UFO Researcher Reportedly Dies Just A Few Years After Saying He Wasn’t Suicidal appeared first on CBNC .

title: UFO Expert David Wilcock Dead: Whistleblower Alleges Harassment, Probe Underway
description: UFO researcher David Wilcock died in Colorado after an armed incident near Nederland, cause of death under review, colleague Corey Goode cites prior online harassment concerns.

title: How Did Amy Eskridge Die? Chilling Last Text, DEW, Havana Syndrome Claims Emerge In UFO Scientist's Death
description: Amy Eskridge’s 2022 death, officially ruled a suicide, is under renewed scrutiny after chilling texts and claims of harassment, directed energy weapons, and Havana Syndrome surfaced. While a former intelligence officer alleges foul play, Eskridge’s family maintains there is no mystery, dismissing conspiracy theories surrounding her death.

title: David Wilcock, UFO writer and 'Ancient Aliens' figure, dead at 53
description: David Wilcock, the paranormal author, YouTuber and prominent voice in the UFO disclosure movement, died Monday near Nederland, Colorado. He was 53.
